questions.question:
Which of the following statements is correct?



UGC NET CSE | July 2016 | Part 3 | Question: 39
options: Aggregation is a strong type of association between two classes with full ownership
Aggregation is a strong type of association between two classes with partial ownership
Aggregation is a weak type of association between two classes with partial ownership
Aggregation is a weak type of association between two classes with full ownership
questions.correct_answer: Aggregation is a weak type of association between two classes with partial ownership
